name: Security Report
about: Report a security vulnerability privately

---

> **Please do not file security issues here.**
> Public issues are visible to everyone and we cannot move a
> discussion to private once it is public.
>
> Report security vulnerabilities by emailing **dbowman91@proton.me**
> (PGP key on request). See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for the
> full policy, supported versions, and response timeline.
>
> This template is here so that GitHub's "New issue" picker offers
> it — opening it will remind you of the right channel. Close this
> issue without filing if you came here by accident.
